name: PCI DSS Compliance Check
description: Automated PCI DSS compliance verification workflow. Scans cardholder data environments for compliance violations across key requirements including network segmentation, encryption, access controls, and logging. Riggs AI analyzes scan results against PCI DSS requirements, flags violations, and routes findings based on severity. Critical violations trigger immediate Jira tickets and SOC notification; minor findings are logged for the next audit cycle.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Qualys
required_integrations.reason: Run PCI compliance scans against cardholder data environment

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create remediation tickets for PCI DSS violations

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify compliance and security teams of PCI findings

config.description: Triggers weekly PCI DSS compliance scan of cardholder data environment
Launch PCI DSS compliance scan against all systems in the cardholder data environment

config.additional_instructions: Analyze scan results against PCI DSS v4.0 requirements. Categorize each finding by PCI requirement number, severity, and compensating controls. Identify critical violations requiring immediate remediation.
config.description: AI-powered analysis of PCI DSS scan results against compliance requirements
Routes based on whether critical PCI DSS violations were detected
Create a P1 Jira ticket for critical PCI DSS violations requiring immediate remediation
Send urgent notification to compliance team about critical PCI DSS violations

parameters.note: PCI DSS scan completed. No critical violations found. Minor findings logged for next audit cycle: {{analyze_1.summary}}

config.description: Log minor PCI findings for inclusion in the next scheduled audit cycle
